task_completion.description: Verify that Apache OpenOffice Writer is opened and used to create the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Apache OpenOffice Writer application window should be visible in the screenshots.

task_completion.description: Verify the cover page contains the required information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a cover page containing 'TruePoint Calibration Labs, LLC', 'A2LA Certificate #4521', 'Southeastern Chemical Processing, Inc.', and 'SCP-2024-0147'.

task_completion.description: Verify that individual certificates are created for the required instruments with their serial numbers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for certificate sections or pages for Fluke 87V (S/N: 27340089), Omega HH42A (S/N: TC-88712), Ashcroft 2089 (S/N: PG-445601), and Mettler Toledo ML3002E (S/N: B912004567).

task_completion.description: Verify that the certificates include dates, environmental conditions, traceability, and uncertainty statements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text or sections mentioning calibration/due dates, environmental conditions (like temperature/humidity), reference standard traceability, and uncertainty statements within the certificates.

task_completion.description: Verify that measurement data tables are included with the required columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for tables containing columns or headers for nominal, as-found, as-left, tolerances, and pass/fail, populated with numerical readings.

task_completion.description: Verify that Heading 1 and Heading 2 styles are applied to titles and subsections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for visually distinct, large bold text for titles and subsections, or the formatting toolbar showing 'Heading 1' or 'Heading 2' selected when the cursor is on these elements.

task_completion.description: Verify that the document is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar of the OpenOffice Writer window or a save dialog should display 'CalCert_Package_SCP_2024_0147.odt'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the OpenOffice Writer GUI to create and format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing, formatting, or inserting tables within the OpenOffice Writer interface, rather than just running a terminal command to generate the file.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent accessed the provided JSON data file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent opening or viewing 'calibration_data.json' in a text editor, terminal, or viewer to extract the necessary information.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Lab Name: TruePoint Calibration Labs, LLC. Client Name: Southeastern Chemical Processing, Inc. Required Serial Numbers: 27340089 (Fluke 87V), TC-88712 (Omega HH42A), PG-445601 (Ashcroft 2089), B912004567 (Mettler Toledo ML3002E). Required terms in tables/text: tolerance, as-found, as-left, expanded_uncertainty. Accreditation: ISO/IEC 17025:2017.
